form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into twelfth behind Jane Cash at Cordemais over 2825m in a 7-11yo handicap on February 27 at $96. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8.2m finishing second behind Denia at Machecoul over 2700m in a 7-11yo handicap euro open restricted race on March 15. Looks ready to win again.
